name: strong_password RubyGem RCE Backdoor
description: Hijacked strong_password gem waits random time (up to 1h), checks Rails production environment, fetches payload from Pastebin, enables cookie-based RCE. 537 downloads of malicious version.

affected_packages.name: strong_password
affected_packages.note: Maintainer lost ownership. Only activates in Rails production.

remediation: Remove strong_password 0.0.7, use any other version
Audit Rails production logs for suspicious cookie-based requests
